Operating Systems

Cutting-edge OS builds for developers, creators, and power users

Cyberzilla Core OS

Lightweight, secure, and optimized for AI workloads. Built on a custom Linux kernel with real-time processing capabilities.

  • Real-time AI acceleration
  • Hardened security kernel
  • Container-native architecture
  • Futuristic UI/UX design
Download ISO

Neon Dev OS

Developer-focused distribution with pre-configured AI tools, automation frameworks, and blockchain development stacks.

  • Pre-installed AI toolchains
  • Automated deployment scripts
  • Docker/Podman optimized
  • Web3 development ready
Download ISO

Quantum Server OS

Enterprise-grade server operating system designed for high-availability clusters and quantum computing integration.

  • Cluster orchestration built-in
  • Quantum API integration
  • Zero-trust security model
  • 99.99% uptime guarantee
Download ISO

Streamline Desktop

User-friendly desktop environment with integrated AI assistants, creative tools, and seamless cloud synchronization.

  • AI-powered desktop assistant
  • Creative suite included
  • Multi-cloud integration
  • Gaming optimized
Download ISO

Cyberzilla Lite

Minimalist OS for IoT devices and edge computing. Runs on as little as 512MB RAM with full AI capabilities.

  • Ultra-lightweight footprint
  • Edge AI processing
  • Low-power optimization
  • Remote management suite
Download ISO

SecureVault OS

Privacy-first operating system with end-to-end encryption, anonymous networking, and digital forensics tools.

  • Full disk encryption
  • Anonymous routing built-in
  • Forensic analysis tools
  • Hardware security module
Download ISO

Why Cyberzilla OS?

⚡ Performance

Optimized kernel with real-time scheduling and AI-accelerated workloads.

🔒 Security

Hardened from the ground up with zero-trust architecture and encrypted everything.

🤖 AI-First

Built for the AI era with native ML frameworks and neural processing support.
